<!-- Thanks for contributing to Wave UI! -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / component
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test`, and `npm run build` pass
- [ ] Stories are in sync (new parts / variants / props are demoed)
- [ ] Added a changeset (`npx changeset`) if this affects consumers
- [ ] Accessible by default (roles, keyboard, reduced-motion) where relevant
